notes: INTERFACE: front-door docs and control-plane scaffold describe and display governance; do not supersede STATUS.json or authorize new passes.

JUDICIAL: attestation verification recomputes hashes and halts on drift; PASS 16 --verification-runs-dir for isolated CI replay.

RECORD: persisted run and attestation JSON under verification/.
